company.name: Woven by Toyota
company.description:
Woven by Toyota exists to accelerate Toyota’s once-in-a-century transformation from a car company into a mobility company. Rooted in a legacy of reinvention, we carry forward a singular founding principle: to innovate for the benefit of others. 

Today, we are driving this transformation from two vantage points: redefining how vehicles are built, experienced, and connected to the world to realize a true software-defined vehicle, and reimagining how people, goods, information, and energy move and interact in society to empower individuals from all walks of life. 

Through these two lenses, we combine bold innovation with real-world execution, bridging the gap between present and future to help Toyota evolve its business and its role in society.

headquarters.line2: Nihonbashi Muromachi Mitsui Tower Chuo-ku, Tokyo 103-0022, JP

all.title: Sales Division Manager
all.description:
- Promoted joint product development projects with 4 partner companies as marketing manager and led to start test sales.

- Spearheaded optimization of manufacturing process of BtoC product line by utilizing OEM and reduced manufacturing cost by 30%.

all.title: General Administration Division Manager
all.description:
- Rebuilt the financial planning model from scratch, synchronized it with budget control and extracted KPI from it for each department to manage the tasks of charge.

- Managed companywide project (18 employees and 6 contract-workers) with systemized methods and procured 400 million JPY as additional investment by clearing the phase gates of business development (marketing, development and IPR protection). Assisted alliances with major materials / equipment suppliers by taking charge of negotiations and contracts.

- Transferred the accounting and administrative work from the parent company to its own, launched operations with 1 new employee and put the job on track. Planned comprehensive budget and formed manufacturing cost management system.

all.title: Group Manager, Sales Division
all.description:
- Traveled to overseas (Europe and Chine) on a pace 3 times a year for new business marketing and identified alliance partner candidates. Concluded contract with 1 Japanese multi-national company and 4 European companies as partner, facilitated collaborative R&D projects with 8 other companies and improved market entry strategy. With this result, contributed to raise 380 million JPY as additional investment from shareholders.

- Enlarged BtoC product sales besides main BtoB business, building sales channels exceeding 100 stores with 1 sales staff and 1 sales assistant, added 1 new item to the product line.

all.title: Group Manager, Corporate Strategy Division
all.description:
- Coordinated with different divisions and formulated a financial planning model with a subcontractor, based on business strategy and development planning.

- In charge of department reporting at the Board of Directors on behalf of the department head (outside director). Mediated with external/internal shareholders as responsible of the department which accepted 6 seconded employees from the stockholders.

- Developed CI/VI accompanying the launch of the new company, and built up the corporate website in a short time. Acquired Google search top with important keywords of new business with appropriate SEO design.

all.title: Sphelar sales and marketing Group Manager
all.description:
- Acquired 3 sales representatives in Denmark, France and Italy for targeting the energy harvest and M2M market. Made business trip several times a year into Europe and accompany visits to customers from major telecommunication company to ODM of electrical appliance.

- Carried out product development projects with European luxury brands, focusing on the combination of functionality, aesthetic design and user experience.

- Proposed to develop a BtoC original product as communication tool of new technology, successfully executed it by acquiring public subsidies as development fund and developed a continuous business (tens of millions JPY annually).

- Contributed to fundraising of 600 million JPY and to establishment of spin-off company (Sphelar Power), with describing business strategy after interviewing of potential customers, partners, end-users in different industries.

company.name: TOYOTA InfoTechnology Center Co., Ltd.
company.description:
Corporate Goals
Value creation: We provide cutting-edge technology and create value with superior intelligence and greater innovation throughout the IT business.
Innovation: We have a clear vision for business growth using globally-focused innovative strategies that allow our people and communities to prosper.
Compliance: We, as good corporate citizens, set a high standard to do business with integrity, leading to mutual success for the company and its individuals.

Corporate Mission
Without being bound by the way things have been done in the past, we collaborate with our stakeholders to grapple with the challenges involved in applying IT to the car. We are helping bring to life diverse and inspirational new ways for cars and people to interact.

Corporate Culture
We are dedicated to supporting and encourage an environment that values the individual and inspires everyone to be their personal best. We are a diverse community of talented people, all of whom are integral to the success of our business. We value, respect, and include everyone, and create a corporate culture that fosters innovation.

company.name: IBM
company.description:
At IBM, we do more than work. We create. We create as technologists, developers, and engineers. We create with our partners. We create with our competitors. If you're searching for ways to make the world work better through technology and infrastructure, software and consulting, then we want to work with you.

We're here to help every creator turn their "what if" into what is. Let's create something that will change everything.
